sentences.arabic: أُجَهِّزُ حَقِيبَةَ السَّفَرِ لِرِحْلَتِي الْقَادِمَةِ إِلَى الْجِبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Pripremam kofer za svoje predstojeće putovanje u planine.
sentences.translationEn: I am preparing my suitcase for my upcoming trip to the mountains.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعْتُ مَلَابِسَ ثَقِيلَةً لِأَنَّ الطَّقْسَ هُنَاكَ بَارِدٌ جِدًّا فِي الشِّتَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Spakovao sam toplu odjeću jer je tamo veoma hladno vrijeme zimi.
sentences.translationEn: I packed heavy clothes because the weather there is very cold in winter.

sentences.arabic: تَأَكَّدْتُ مِنْ وُجُودِ جَوَازِ السَّفَرِ وَالْمَالِ فِي مَكَانٍ آمِنٍ.
sentences.translation: Provjerio sam da li su mi pasoš i novac na sigurnom mjestu.
sentences.translationEn: I made sure that my passport and money are in a safe place.

sentences.arabic: سَأُسَافِرُ مَعَ عَائِلَتِي فِي عُطْلَةِ نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Putovat ću sa svojom porodicom tokom vikenda.
sentences.translationEn: I will travel with my family over the weekend.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ مُتَحَمِّسُونَ جِدًّا لِهَذِهِ الْمُغَامَرَةِ الْجَدِيدَةِ فِي الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Veoma smo uzbuđeni zbog ove nove avanture u prirodi.
sentences.translationEn: We are very excited about this new adventure in nature.
